name: Julius Miettinen
bio: Skilled two-way center, standout in Liiga before coming to North America

name: Eduard Sale
bio: Creative winger with elite hands, captain of Czechia at World Juniors

name: Jagger Firkus
bio: Sniper with one of the best wrist shots in the system

name: Jani Nyman
bio: Big power forward with a strong shot, made his NHL debut in 2024-25

name: Jake O'Brien
bio: Highly creative playmaker, OHL Rookie of the Year two seasons ago

name: Ty Nelson
bio: Undersized but plays bigger than his frame, massive shot and strong compete level

name: Blake Fiddler
bio: Big-bodied 6'4 defender, mobile for his size, versatile two-way blueliner

name: Carson Rehkopf
bio: Versatile winger with good size and compete level

name: Caden Price
bio: Mobile offensive defenseman, underrated prospect with high upside

name: Oscar Fisker Molgaard
bio: Smart two-way center from Denmark, strong defensive instincts

name: Lukas Dragicevic
bio: Offensive-minded defenseman, slender but effective in transition

name: Nikke Kokko
bio: Athletic goalie who took over as Coachella Valley starter, big steps each season with size and competitiveness

name: Ville Ottavainen
bio: Big Finnish blueliner at 6'4, physical presence with good mobility for his size

name: Victor Ostman
bio: Undrafted 6'4 Swedish goalie signed out of UMaine, made his NHL debut in 2024-25 and impressed with strong AHL numbers
